scope: M5 Batch 024 draft. Adds engine-room, machinery-status, flooding, fire, steering, emergency power, and damage-control radio communication. Draft only: no starter merge and no production deploy.

items.source_text: Машинное отделение.
accepted_answers: engine room
the engine room

qa_notes.linguist_note: Engine-room location must not become bridge, deck, or radio room.

items.source_text: Осушительный насос.
accepted_answers: bilge pump

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Bilge pump removes bilge water; it is not fuel pump, fire pump, or tank
qa_notes.linguist_note: Bilge pump removes bilge water; it is not fuel pump, fire pump, or tank.

items.source_text: Рулевое устройство.
accepted_answers: steering gear

qa_notes.linguist_note: Steering gear must remain the steering system, not generic gear.

items.source_text: Пожарный насос.
accepted_answers: fire pump

qa_notes.linguist_note: Fire pump must not collapse into fuel or bilge pump.

items.source_text: Водонепроницаемая дверь.
accepted_answers: watertight door

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Watertight door is a damage-control boundary, not a weather or gangway door
qa_notes.linguist_note: Watertight door is a damage-control boundary, not a weather or gangway door.

items.source_text: Перегрев двигателя.
accepted_answers: engine overheating
main engine overheating

qa_notes.linguist_note: Overheating status must not become cooling, stopped, or normal.

items.source_text: Отказ рулевого управления.
accepted_answers: steering failure
steering gear failure

qa_notes.linguist_note: Steering failure must not become engine/radio failure or normal status.

items.source_text: Осушительный насос работает.
accepted_answers: bilge pump running
bilge pump is running

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Pump identity and running/stopped polarity are safety-critical
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pump identity and running/stopped polarity are safety-critical.

items.source_text: Пожарный насос готов.
accepted_answers: fire pump ready
fire pump is ready

qa_notes.linguist_note: Readiness and pump identity must stay exact.

items.source_text: Закрыть водонепроницаемую дверь.
accepted_answers: close watertight door
close the watertight door

qa_notes.linguist_note: Close/open polarity and door type must stay exact.

items.source_text: Изолировать подачу топлива.
accepted_answers: isolate fuel supply
shut off fuel supply

qa_notes.linguist_note: Fuel isolation must not become water isolation, opening, or increasing fuel.

items.source_text: Запустить аварийный генератор.
accepted_answers: start emergency generator
start the emergency generator

qa_notes.linguist_note: Emergency generator action must not become stop or unrelated equipment.

items.source_text: Доложить состояние повреждений.
accepted_answers: report damage status
report the damage status

qa_notes.linguist_note: Damage status report must not become weather/passenger status or cancellation.

items.source_text: Машинное отделение докладывает перегрев.
accepted_answers: Engine room reports overheating.
Engine room reporting overheating.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Location and overheating status must remain exact.

items.source_text: Немедленно остановите главный двигатель.
accepted_answers: Stop main engine immediately.
Stop the main engine immediately.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Stop/start polarity and equipment identity are safety-critical
qa_notes.linguist_note: Stop/start polarity and equipment identity are safety-critical.

items.source_text: Отказ рулевого устройства, судно не управляется.
items.target_text: Steering gear failure, vessel not under command.
accepted_answers: Steering gear failure, vessel not under command.
Steering failure, vessel not under command.

should_accept: Steering gear failure, vessel not under command.
should_reject: Engine failure vessel not under command
Steering gear ready vessel under command
Vessel restricted in ability to manoeuvre
qa_notes.linguist_note: Steering failure and NUC status must not become other legal status or readiness.

items.source_text: Осушительный насос работает, уровень воды повышается.
items.target_text: Bilge pump running, water level rising.
accepted_answers: Bilge pump running, water level rising.
Bilge pump is running, water level is rising.

should_accept: Bilge pump running, water level rising.
should_reject: Bilge pump stopped water level falling
Fuel pump running water level rising
Bilge pump running fuel level rising
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pump identity and water-level trend must stay exact.

items.source_text: Пожар в машинном отделении, виден дым.
items.target_text: Fire in engine room, smoke visible.
accepted_answers: Fire in engine room, smoke visible.
Fire in the engine room, smoke visible.

should_accept: Fire in engine room, smoke visible.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Real fire/location/status must not become drill, cleared smoke, or deck fire.

items.source_text: Закройте водонепроницаемую дверь во втором отсеке.
items.target_text: Close watertight door in compartment two.
accepted_answers: Close watertight door in compartment two.
Close the watertight door in compartment two.

should_accept: Close watertight door in compartment two.
should_reject: Open watertight door in compartment two
Close watertight door in compartment three
Close cabin door in compartment two
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Action, compartment number, and door type
qa_notes.linguist_note: Action, compartment number, and door type must remain exact.

items.source_text: Изолируйте подачу топлива к главному двигателю.
items.target_text: Isolate fuel supply to main engine.
accepted_answers: Isolate fuel supply to main engine.
Shut off fuel supply to main engine.

should_accept: Isolate fuel supply to main engine.
should_reject: Open fuel supply to main engine
Isolate water supply to main engine
qa_notes.linguist_note: Fuel/action/equipment boundaries must stay exact.

items.source_text: Запустите аварийный генератор и доложите напряжение.
items.target_text: Start emergency generator and report voltage.
accepted_answers: Start emergency generator and report voltage.
Start the emergency generator and report voltage.

should_accept: Start emergency generator and report voltage.
should_reject: Stop emergency generator and report voltage
Start main engine and report voltage
Start emergency generator and report water level
qa_notes.linguist_note: Generator action and reported value must stay exact.

items.source_text: Аварийная партия идет в машинное отделение.
items.target_text: Damage control team proceeding to engine room.
accepted_answers: Damage control team proceeding to engine room.

should_accept: Damage control team proceeding to engine room.
should_reject: Medical team proceeding to engine room
Damage control team proceeding to bridge
qa_notes.linguist_note: Team role, destination, and action must remain exact.

items.source_text: Затопление локализовано в кормовом отсеке.
accepted_answers: Flooding contained in aft compartment.
Flooding is contained in the aft compartment.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Contained/spreading, hazard type, and compartment direction
qa_notes.linguist_note: Contained/spreading, hazard type, and compartment direction must stay exact.

items.source_text: Требуется помощь при пожаре в машинном отделении.
items.target_text: We require assistance for engine-room fire.
accepted_answers: We require assistance for engine-room fire.
Require assistance for engine room fire.

should_accept: We require assistance for engine-room fire.
should_reject: We require assistance for engine-room drill
We require fuel for engine-room fire
We do not require assistance for engine-room fire
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Assistance request, hazard type, and polarity
qa_notes.linguist_note: Assistance request, hazard type, and polarity must stay exact.

items.source_text: Подготовьте переносной огнетушитель у входа в машинное отделение.
items.target_text: Prepare portable fire extinguisher at engine-room entrance.
accepted_answers: Prepare portable fire extinguisher at engine-room entrance.
Prepare a portable fire extinguisher at the engine-room entrance.

should_accept: Prepare portable fire extinguisher at engine-room entrance.
should_reject: Prepare portable fire extinguisher at galley entrance
Stow portable fire extinguisher at engine-room entrance
qa_notes.linguist_note: Equipment, location, and action must stay exact.

items.source_text: Охлаждение границы ведется по левому борту.
items.target_text: Boundary cooling in progress on port side.
accepted_answers: Boundary cooling in progress on port side.
Boundary cooling is in progress on port side.

should_accept: Boundary cooling in progress on port side.
should_reject: Boundary cooling in progress on starboard side
Boundary cooling completed on port side
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Side and progress state are safety-critical
qa_notes.linguist_note: Side and progress state are safety-critical.

items.source_text: Вентиляция остановлена, доступ в машинное отделение ограничен.
accepted_answers: Ventilation stopped, engine-room access restricted.
Ventilation is stopped, engine-room access is restricted.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Ventilation state and access restriction must stay exact.

items.source_text: Главный двигатель перезапущен на малом ходу.
items.target_text: Main engine restarted at slow speed.
accepted_answers: Main engine restarted at slow speed.
Main engine is restarted at slow speed.

should_accept: Main engine restarted at slow speed.
should_reject: Main engine stopped at slow speed
Emergency generator restarted at slow speed
Main engine restarted at full speed
qa_notes.linguist_note: Equipment, running state, and speed must remain exact.

items.source_text: Аварийное рулевое управление проверено и готово.
accepted_answers: Emergency steering tested and ready.
Emergency steering is tested and ready.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Emergency steering readiness must not become failure, main steering, or generator.

items.source_text: Докладывайте состояние повреждений каждые пять минут.
items.target_text: Report damage status every five minutes.
accepted_answers: Report damage status every five minutes.
Report the damage status every five minutes.

should_accept: Report damage status every five minutes.
should_reject: Report damage status every ten minutes
Report weather status every five minutes
Cancel damage status every five minutes
qa_notes.linguist_note: Time interval and report subject must stay exact.

items.source_text: Утечка топлива остановлена, впитывающие маты уложены.
items.target_text: Fuel leak stopped, absorbent pads deployed.
accepted_answers: Fuel leak stopped, absorbent pads deployed.
Fuel leak is stopped, absorbent pads deployed.

should_accept: Fuel leak stopped, absorbent pads deployed.
should_reject: Fuel leak continues absorbent pads deployed
Water leak stopped absorbent pads deployed
qa_notes.linguist_note: Leak material, status, and equipment must stay exact.

items.source_text: Сигнализация льял активна в машинном отделении.
items.target_text: Bilge alarm active in engine room.
accepted_answers: Bilge alarm active in engine room.
Bilge alarm is active in engine room.

should_accept: Bilge alarm active in engine room.
should_reject: Fire alarm active in engine room
Bilge alarm cancelled in engine room
qa_notes.linguist_note: Alarm type, status, and location must stay exact.

items.source_text: Запрашиваем буксир из-за отказа движителя.
items.target_text: Request tug assistance due to propulsion failure.
accepted_answers: Request tug assistance due to propulsion failure.
We request tug assistance due to propulsion failure.

should_accept: Request tug assistance due to propulsion failure.
should_reject: Request pilot assistance due to propulsion failure
Request tug assistance due to radio failure
Cancel tug assistance due to propulsion failure
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Assistance type, failure type, and request polarity
qa_notes.linguist_note: Assistance type, failure type, and request polarity must stay exact.

items.source_text: Пан-Пан, судно потеряло ход из-за отказа рулевого управления.
items.target_text: Pan-Pan, disabled vessel with steering failure.
accepted_answers: Pan-Pan, disabled vessel with steering failure.

should_accept: Pan-Pan, disabled vessel with steering failure.
should_reject: Mayday disabled vessel with steering failure
Securite disabled vessel with steering failure
Pan-Pan disabled vessel with engine normal
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Urgency marker, disabled status, and failure type
qa_notes.linguist_note: Urgency marker, disabled status, and failure type must stay exact.

items.source_text: Мэйдэй, пожар в машинном отделении не под контролем.
items.target_text: Mayday, engine-room fire not under control.
accepted_answers: Mayday, engine-room fire not under control.

should_accept: Mayday, engine-room fire not under control.
should_reject: Pan-Pan engine-room fire not under control
Mayday galley fire not under control
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Distress marker, control status, and fire location
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress marker, control status, and fire location must stay exact.

examples: Steering gear failure, vessel not under command.
Bilge pump running, water level rising.
Fire in engine room, smoke visible.
Close watertight door in compartment two.
Isolate fuel supply to main engine.
Start emergency generator and report voltage.
Damage control team proceeding to engine room.
We require assistance for engine-room fire.
Prepare portable fire extinguisher at engine-room entrance.
Boundary cooling in progress on port side.
Main engine restarted at slow speed.
Report damage status every five minutes.
Fuel leak stopped, absorbent pads deployed.
Bilge alarm active in engine room.
Request tug assistance due to propulsion failure.
Pan-Pan, disabled vessel with steering failure.
Mayday, engine-room fire not under control.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: b024 machinery location and engine status group

phrase_b024_main_engine_restarted_slow_s: Main engine restarted at slow speed.
Main engine stopped at slow speed
Emergency generator restarted at slow speed

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Engine-room location, engine state, and stop/start polarity must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: b024 bilge and flooding control group

phrase_b024_bilge_pump_running_water_ris: Bilge pump running, water level rising.
phrase_b024_bilge_alarm_active_engine_ro: Bilge alarm active in engine room.

phrase_b024_bilge_pump_running_water_ris: Bilge pump stopped water level falling
Fuel pump running water level rising
phrase_b024_bilge_alarm_active_engine_ro: Fire alarm active in engine room
Bilge alarm cancelled in engine room

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Bilge/flooding terms must not collapse into fuel, fire, or wrong water-level trend.

phrase_b024_steering_gear_failure_nuc_00: Steering gear failure, vessel not under command.
phrase_b024_panpan_disabled_steering_fai: Pan-Pan, disabled vessel with steering failure.

phrase_b024_steering_gear_failure_nuc_00: Engine failure vessel not under command
Steering gear ready vessel under command
phrase_b024_panpan_disabled_steering_fai: Mayday disabled vessel with steering failure
Securite disabled vessel with steering failure

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Steering failure, readiness, disabled status, and radio marker must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: b024 fire pump and fuel isolation group

phrase_b024_isolate_fuel_supply_main_eng: Isolate fuel supply to main engine.
phrase_b024_fuel_leak_stopped_absorbent_: Fuel leak stopped, absorbent pads deployed.

phrase_b024_isolate_fuel_supply_main_eng: Open fuel supply to main engine
Isolate water supply to main engine
phrase_b024_fuel_leak_stopped_absorbent_: Fuel leak continues absorbent pads deployed
Water leak stopped absorbent pads deployed

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Fire/fuel terms, isolation action, and leak status must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: b024 watertight boundary and compartment group

phrase_b024_close_watertight_door_compar: Close watertight door in compartment two.
phrase_b024_boundary_cooling_port_side_0: Boundary cooling in progress on port side.

phrase_b024_close_watertight_door_compar: Open watertight door in compartment two
Close watertight door in compartment three
phrase_b024_boundary_cooling_port_side_0: Boundary cooling in progress on starboard side

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Boundary actions, door type, side, and access state must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: b024 emergency power and damage report group

phrase_b024_start_emergency_generator_re: Start emergency generator and report voltage.
phrase_b024_damage_control_team_engine_r: Damage control team proceeding to engine room.
phrase_b024_report_damage_status_every_f: Report damage status every five minutes.

phrase_b024_start_emergency_generator_re: Stop emergency generator and report voltage
Start main engine and report voltage
phrase_b024_damage_control_team_engine_r: Medical team proceeding to engine room
Damage control team proceeding to bridge
phrase_b024_report_damage_status_every_f: Report damage status every ten minutes
Report weather status every five minutes

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Emergency power, report subject, team role, and reporting interval must stay exact.

phrase_b024_fire_engine_room_smoke_visib: Fire in engine room, smoke visible.
phrase_b024_require_assistance_engine_ro: We require assistance for engine-room fire.
phrase_b024_prepare_extinguisher_engine_: Prepare portable fire extinguisher at engine-room entrance.
phrase_b024_mayday_engine_room_fire_not_: Mayday, engine-room fire not under control.

phrase_b024_require_assistance_engine_ro: We require assistance for engine-room drill
We require fuel for engine-room fire
phrase_b024_prepare_extinguisher_engine_: Prepare portable fire extinguisher at galley entrance
phrase_b024_mayday_engine_room_fire_not_: Pan-Pan engine-room fire not under control

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Fire location, assistance request, extinguisher location, and distress marker must stay exact.

phrase_b024_request_tug_assistance_propu: Request tug assistance due to propulsion failure.
phrase_b024_panpan_disabled_steering_fai: Pan-Pan, disabled vessel with steering failure.
phrase_b024_mayday_engine_room_fire_not_: Mayday, engine-room fire not under control.
phrase_b024_steering_gear_failure_nuc_00: Steering gear failure, vessel not under command.

phrase_b024_request_tug_assistance_propu: Request pilot assistance due to propulsion failure
Request tug assistance due to radio failure
phrase_b024_panpan_disabled_steering_fai: Mayday disabled vessel with steering failure
Securite disabled vessel with steering failure
phrase_b024_mayday_engine_room_fire_not_: Pan-Pan engine-room fire not under control
phrase_b024_steering_gear_failure_nuc_00: Engine failure vessel not under command
Steering gear ready vessel under command

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Tug/pilot assistance, propulsion/steering/fire failures, and Pan-Pan/Mayday boundaries must stay exact.

producer_notes.next_gate: Sea Speak Linguist / Engineering Gate before acceptance QA or merge
